# services.grocy

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.grocy`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.grocy.dataDir` | `string` | Home directory of the `grocy` user which contains the application's state. |
| `services.grocy.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable grocy. |
| `services.grocy.extraConfig` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | These lines go at the end of config.php verbatim. |
| `services.grocy.hostName` | `string` | FQDN for the grocy instance. |
| `services.grocy.nginx.enableSSL` | `boolean` | Whether or not to enable SSL (with ACME and let's encrypt) for the grocy vhost. |
| `services.grocy.package` | `package` | The grocy package to use. |
| `services.grocy.phpfpm.settings` | `attribute set of (signed integer or string or boolean)` | Options for grocy's PHPFPM pool. |
| `services.grocy.settings.calendar.firstDayOfWeek` | `null or one of 0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6` | Which day of the week (0=Sunday, 1=Monday etc.) should be the first day. |
| `services.grocy.settings.calendar.showWeekNumber` | `boolean` | Show the number of the weeks in the calendar views. |
| `services.grocy.settings.culture` | `one of "bg_BG", "ca", "cs", "da", "de", "el_GR", "en", "en_GB", "es", "et_EE", "fi", "fr", "he_IL", "hu", "it", "ja", "ko_KR", "lt", "nl", "no", "pl", "pt_BR", "pt_PT", "ro_RO", "ru", "sk_SK", "sl", "sv_SE", "ta", "tr", "uk", "zh_CN", "zh_TW"` | Display language of the frontend. |
| `services.grocy.settings.currency` | `string` | ISO 4217 code for the currency to display. |
| `services.grocy.settings.entryPage` | `one of "stock", "shoppinglist", "recipes", "chores", "tasks", "batteries", "equipment", "calendar", "mealplan"` | Specify an custom homepage if desired. |
